description_long: This object consists of three cylindrical pieces of sushi, each wrapped in a dark seaweed layer with a visible cross-section of white rice and colorful fillings at the center. The fillings appear to be different for each piece: one with a yellow filling, one with an orange filling, and one with a red filling, suggesting a variety of ingredients such as tamago (egg), salmon, and tuna. The seaweed (nori) forms a tight outer layer, while the rice is compact and evenly distributed around the fillings. The sushi pieces are arranged in a straight line, with each piece maintaining a uniform size and shape. The surface of the sushi is matte, with a slight sheen on the seaweed, and the rice grains are individually distinguishable. There is no visible packaging or serving plate, and the sushi is presented directly on a neutral surface.
description: Three cylindrical maki sushi pieces with colorful fillings, wrapped in dark seaweed and surrounded by white rice. Each piece features a distinct center ingredient, arranged in a neat row.
description_view_0: Three sushi rolls are seen from the side, showing the colorful fillings (yellow, orange, red) and the dark seaweed wrap.
description_view_1: The sushi rolls are viewed from above, highlighting the circular cross-sections and the arrangement of fillings in each piece.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the sushi rolls with the fillings in reverse order, emphasizing the uniformity of the seaweed wrap.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective from the other end, focusing on the yellow-filled sushi piece in the foreground and the others behind.
